grok-3.detail: CD3D, CD3E, CD3G are canonical T cell markers. TCF7 and IL7R indicate naive phenotype.

deepseek-v3.2.detail: High expression of pan-T cell markers (CD3D/E/G) and IL7R/TCF7 indicates a naive state.

qwen-plus.detail: CD3D/E/G confirm T lineage; IL7R and TCF7 are canonical markers of naive CD4+ T cells.

consensus.reasoning: All three models agree on Naive CD4+ T Cells based on CD3D, CD3E, CD3G, IL7R, TCF7 markers.

grok-3.detail: CD79A, CD79B, MS4A1 are B cell markers. IGHM and IGKC indicate naive B cells.

deepseek-v3.2.detail: Canonical B cell markers (CD79A/B, MS4A1) with IGHM and IGKC indicating naive B cells.

qwen-plus.detail: CD79A/B and MS4A1 confirm B lineage; IGHM and IGKC indicate immunoglobulin expression for naive B cells.

consensus.reasoning: All models agree on Naive B Cells based on CD79A, CD79B, MS4A1, IGHM markers.

grok-3.detail: CD14 and LYZ are hallmark markers for classical monocytes.

deepseek-v3.2.detail: Strong CD14 expression with FCN1 defines classical monocytes.

qwen-plus.detail: CD14 and LYZ are classical monocyte markers; FCN1 further defines this subset.

consensus.reasoning: All models agree on Classical Monocytes based on CD14, LYZ, FCN1 markers.
